contexts.context: DN thanks MK for his <mark>enthusiastic</mark> engagement with the proposal.
MK: We were over-<mark>enthusiastic</mark> in deciding the right hand side could be either…
…, and Kurt Cagle, many of whom expressed <mark>enthusiastic</mark> support for the work.
NW: I was <mark>enthusiastic</mark>, but my enthusiasm crashed on the attributes.…
…: We should only change the spec if there’s <mark>enthusiastic</mark> support.
